name: SignatureType
title: Signature Code (2.9.1 - 1.0.0)
description: Code system of concepts that indicate how a patient/subscriber authorization signature is obtained and how it is being retained by a provider.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the IN1 segment.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Signed CMS-1500 claim form on file
concept.definition: Signed CMS-1500 claim form on file, e.g., authorization for release of any medical or other information necessary to process this claim and assignment of benefits.

concept.display: Signed authorization for assignment of benefits on file.
concept.definition: Signed authorization for assignment of benefits on file.

concept.display: Signature generated by provider because the patient was not physically present for services.
concept.definition: Signature generated by provider because the patient was not physically present for services.

concept.display: Signed authorization for release of any medical or other information necessary to process this claim on file.
concept.definition: Signed authorization for release of any medical or other information necessary to process this claim on file.
